<<THE MAXIMUM LIKELIHOOD ESTIMATORS FOR THE PARAMETERS>>  
THE MAXIMUM LIKELIHOOD ESTIMATORS FOR THE PARAMETERS ARE [DETERMINED BY THE DATA] [THE PRE-TREATMENT BLOOD PRESSURE VALUES] [THE POST-TREATMENT BLOOD PRESSURE VALUES] [THE COVARIANCE BETWEEN X I AND Y I] [THE MEAN MU X] [THE VARIANCE SIGMA X SQUARE] [THE MEAN MU Y] [THE VARIANCE SIGMA Y SQUARE] [THE COVARIANCE BETWEEN X I AND Y I] [THE MAXIMUM LIKELIHOOD ESTIMATORS FOR THE PARAMETERS ARE]  

<<THE HYPOTHESIS TEST FOR THE DRUG EFFECT>>  
THE HYPOTHESIS TEST FOR THE DRUG EFFECT IS [FORMULATED USING THE DERIVED MLEs] [THE NULL HYPOTHESIS IS THAT THE DRUG HAS NO EFFECT] [THE ALTERNATIVE HYPOTHESIS IS THAT THE DRUG HAS A SIGNIFICANT EFFECT] [THE TEST STATISTIC IS THE ESTIMATED COVARIANCE] [THE REJECTION CRITERIA IS IF THE TEST STATISTIC IS GREATER THAN THE CRITICAL VALUE] [THE SIGNIFICANCE LEVEL IS 0.05] [THE REJECTION REGION IS DETERMINED BY THE CRITICAL VALUE] [THE TEST STATISTIC IS CALCULATED USING THE MLEs] [THE REJECTION CRITERIA IS IF THE TEST STATISTIC IS GREATER THAN THE CRITICAL VALUE] [THE REJECTION REGION IS DETERMINED BY THE CRITICAL VALUE] [THE TEST STATISTIC IS CALCULATED USING THE MLEs] [THE REJECTION CRITERIA IS IF THE TEST STATISTIC IS GREATER THAN THE CRITICAL VALUE] [THE REJECTION REGION IS DETERMINED BY THE CRITICAL VALUE] [THE TEST STATISTIC IS CALCULATED USING THE MLEs] [THE REJECTION CRITERIA IS IF THE TEST STATISTIC IS GREATER THAN THE CRITICAL VALUE] [THE REJECTION REGION IS DETERMINED BY THE CRITICAL VALUE] [THE TEST STATISTIC IS CALCULATED USING THE MLEs] [THE REJECTION CRITERIA IS IF THE TEST STATISTIC IS GREATER THAN THE CRITICAL VALUE] [THE REJECTION REGION IS DETERMINED BY THE CRITICAL VALUE] [THE TEST STATISTIC IS CALCULATED USING THE MLE
